name: RiskMetrics Group, Inc.
description: RiskMetrics Group, Inc. was a prominent provider of risk management and corporate governance products and services to participants in the global financial markets, including asset managers, banks, and hedge funds. Originally established as a division within J.P. Morgan in 1989, the company became an independent entity that provided critical analytics, data, and research to help institutions measure and manage financial risk. RiskMetrics Group was publicly traded on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol RMG until it was acquired by MSCI Inc. in 2010, integrating its specialized financial solutions into MSCI's broader portfolio.
